He got us a home and everything!” “Most of us work in the fields, but considering my talent.” He playfully flicks his tongue out, showing off its impressive length before darting it back into his mouth. “I thought I could be of better use at the barns.” Speaking of ‘talent,’ it’s hard not to notice the huge bulge in his overalls. Those little critters can be hard to catch, but once you pull in a big one, you feel like a king!” He chuckles proudly. “I even keep a couple of ‘em at home.” The hat gave that one away. “I also enjoy hiking and swimming.
